issue_summary: Zoom reports an identified service degradation affecting a subset of users with Zoom Chat in the North America region. The issue remains unresolved as of the latest vendor update.
why_you_care: Client chats, internal coordination, and support escalations that rely on Zoom Chat may be delayed or fail intermittently, generating user confusion and avoidable helpdesk noise.
impact: North America subset; chat workflows degraded, while broader Zoom services are not indicated as down in the current incident notice.
status: Identified — vendor says engineering is actively working on a resolution.
response_1: Advise affected users to shift urgent conversations to Teams, email, SMS, or phone until chat behavior stabilizes.
response_2: Watch for client reports tied specifically to Zoom Chat in North America and avoid treating this as a full Zoom platform outage.
